title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 267.040 - Under control of director
text:
267.040.  Under control of director. — Said veterinary surgeon shall be under the control of the director of the department of agriculture, who may remove him, whenever in his judgment the good of the veterinary service of the state may demand it.
(RSMo 1939 § 14192) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12521; 1919 § 12080; 1909 § 709 
State director of agriculture to have charge of veterinary service, 261.020
